disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Canadians exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship complete isolation period - CBC
updates.body_en: Canadians exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship complete isolation period CBC
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大邮轮接触汉坦病毒者完成隔离。

updates.title_en: CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as All 18 Americans from the Cruise Ship Return Home Safely - Medical Daily
updates.body_en: CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as All 18 Americans from the Cruise Ship Return Home Safely Medical Daily
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒响应，18 名美国人安全返家。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak 'nearing end' as total cases hold at 13: WHO - Türkiye Today
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak 'nearing end' as total cases hold at 13: WHO Türkiye Today
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称土耳其汉坦病毒疫情接近尾声，病例数维持 13 例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak nearing its end, WHO chief says - The New Daily
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak nearing its end, WHO chief says The New Daily
updates.summary_zh: WHO 负责人称汉坦病毒疫情接近结束。

updates.title_en: Scientists discover 70 existing drugs that block deadly hantavirus infections - News-Medical
updates.body_en: Scientists discover 70 existing drugs that block deadly hantavirus infections News-Medical
updates.summary_zh: 科学家发现 70 种现有药物可阻断致命汉坦病毒感染。

updates.title_en: CDC concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC结束汉坦病毒疫情响应，疫情缓解。

updates.title_en: Bend doctor on hantavirus ship released from quarantine - bendbulletin.com
updates.body_en: Bend doctor on hantavirus ship released from quarantine bendbulletin.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国本德市一名医生从汉坦病毒邮轮隔离中获释。

updates.title_en: Irish survivor of deadly hantavirus cruise ship plans next voyage - The Times
updates.body_en: Irish survivor of deadly hantavirus cruise ship plans next voyage The Times
updates.summary_zh: 爱尔兰幸存者计划再次乘坐邮轮。

updates.title_en: Ann Lane - People started dying , the Captain told us it was Hantavirus | Brendan OConnor
updates.summary_zh: 船长告知乘客汉坦病毒导致死亡。

updates.title_en: Irish woman on board hantavirus-hit cruise ship ‘surprised’ she didn’t become infected - The Irish Times
updates.body_en: Irish woman on board hantavirus-hit cruise ship ‘surprised’ she didn’t become infected The Irish Times
updates.summary_zh: 爱尔兰女子对未感染汉坦病毒感到惊讶。

updates.title_en: Irish woman stuck on hantavirus ship says she cant believe she escaped virus
updates.summary_zh: 爱尔兰女子被困汉坦病毒邮轮，称难以置信逃过感染。

updates.title_en: Kenya health system put to test amid Ebola preparedness
updates.summary_zh: 肯尼亚卫生系统面临埃博拉防控考验。
